docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-21-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE BUT DID NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHILTON, AYESHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIEGEL, GARY $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $970.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA #26861 ON 5/1/02 NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-16-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ALL PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN, UNLESS PLTF NOTIFIES COURT TO DROP FROM CALENDAR OR TRANSFER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHILTON, AYESHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIEGEL, GARY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, (THIS WAS AN INTENTIONAL TORT ASSAULT & BATTERY) AWARD BASED UPON: $1000 + MEDICALS; $200 FOR LOST WAGES; $582.28 PROPERY DAMAGE & REMAINDER IS FOR PAIN & SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
